entities.name: Worker
entities.context: a role involved in addressing issues within the knowledge system

entities.name: orchestrator
entities.context: a role that can accept code changes with notes

entities.name: Scope creep
entities.context: a concept related to project management and work scope

entities.name: whitelist
entities.context: a concept related to security and permissions in code modifications

entities.name: code style standards
entities.context: guidelines that code must adhere to

entities.name: error handling
entities.context: a programming concept concerned with handling errors effectively

entities.name: performance concern
entities.context: a concept related to the efficiency of code

entities.name: security vulnerability
entities.context: a potential weakness in the code that can be exploited

entities.name: implementation
entities.context: refers to realizing or executing code functionalities

relationships.context: Worker is aware of scope creep issues
Worker refers to the whitelist for authorized changes
Worker is expected to know and adhere to style standards
Worker needs to implement proper error handling
Worker can discuss performance concerns in code
Worker must identify and fix security vulnerabilities
Worker is involved in the implementation of deliverables
